children.heading: Acceptance of donations
children.label: a Acceptance of donations
children.text: The Librarian of Congress may solicit and accept donations of funds and in-kind contributions to carry out the oral history program under .section 2142 of this title

children.heading: Establishment of separate gift account
children.label: b Establishment of separate gift account
children.text: There is established in the Treasury (among the accounts of the Library of Congress) a gift account for the oral history program under .section 2142 of this title

any funds donated to the Librarian of Congress to carry out the oral history program under shall be deposited entirely into the gift account established under subsection (b);section 2142 of this title
the funds contained in such account shall be used solely to carry out the oral history program under ; andsection 2142 of this title

the Librarian of Congress may not deposit into such account any funds donated to the Librarian which are not donated for the exclusive purpose of carrying out the oral history program under .section 2142 of this title
